name: AtkinsRealis Group Inc.
lede: AtkinsRealis runs three centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Gurugram and Mumbai, covering SSC and CoE, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AtkinsRealis office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AtkinsRealis Group Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AtkinsRealis runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram, Mumbai), covering SSC and CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: AtkinsRealis's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Gurugram and Mumbai, spanning SSC and CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 26 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: AtkinsRealis operates 3 active centers in India.
